test_cases.name: happy_path_standard_product
test_cases.scenario: Generate 10 platform variations for a standard SaaS product with complete inputs and default brand voice.

input.product_description: CloudSync is a real-time file synchronization tool for remote teams, enabling instant collaboration without version conflicts. Supports 50+ file types and integrates with Slack, Microsoft Teams, and Google Workspace.
input.brand_voice_guidelines: Tone: professional yet approachable. Vocabulary: accessible. Values: clarity, efficiency, trust.

test_cases.expected_behavior: All 10 platform variations are generated with consistent brand voice, metadata includes product name and keywords, quality report shows tone consistency ≥75 and brand alignment ≥75.
phase_coverage: Phase 3: Generate Email & Landing Page Variations
Phase 4: Generate App Store & Video Variations

test_cases.name: happy_path_with_custom_brand_voice
test_cases.scenario: Generate variations with explicit custom brand voice guidelines specifying tone, vocabulary, and values.

input.product_description: EcoTrack helps sustainability teams measure and reduce carbon emissions across supply chains. Real-time dashboards, automated reporting, and AI-powered recommendations.
input.brand_voice_guidelines: Tone: eco-conscious and inspiring. Vocabulary: technical but accessible. Values: sustainability, transparency, innovation.
input.target_audience_override: Sustainability managers at mid-market manufacturing companies

test_cases.expected_behavior: All variations reflect eco-conscious and inspiring tone, vocabulary is technical but accessible, brand alignment score ≥75, metadata documents custom brand voice.
phase_coverage: Phase 3: Generate Email & Landing Page Variations
Phase 4: Generate App Store & Video Variations

test_cases.name: happy_path_without_ctas
test_cases.scenario: Generate variations with include_ctas set to false, ensuring no explicit calls-to-action appear.

input.product_description: DataVault is a secure data warehouse for healthcare organizations, enabling HIPAA-compliant analytics and reporting without manual data entry.

test_cases.expected_behavior: All 10 variations are generated without explicit CTAs, default brand voice is applied and documented, platform_compliance_flags is empty.
phase_coverage: Phase 3: Generate Email & Landing Page Variations
Phase 4: Generate App Store & Video Variations

test_cases.name: edge_case_minimal_product_description
test_cases.scenario: Generate variations with a minimal product description at the 50-character boundary.

input.product_description: TaskFlow automates workflow management for teams.
input.brand_voice_guidelines: Tone: casual and witty. Vocabulary: accessible. Values: simplicity, speed.

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill gracefully handles minimal input, extracts core messaging (product name, benefit, audience), generates all 10 variations, quality report documents that messaging_blueprint was inferred from limited input.
phase_coverage: Phase 3: Generate Email & Landing Page Variations
Phase 4: Generate App Store & Video Variations

test_cases.name: edge_case_maximum_keywords
test_cases.scenario: Generate variations with exactly 8 keywords (maximum allowed) to test keyword prioritization and integration.

input.product_description: SecureVault is an enterprise password manager with zero-knowledge encryption, biometric authentication, and team collaboration features for Fortune 500 companies.
input.brand_voice_guidelines: Tone: enterprise-focused and trustworthy. Vocabulary: technical. Values: security, trust, innovation.

test_cases.expected_behavior: All 8 keywords are mapped to platforms (high-priority for App Store and YouTube, medium-priority for LinkedIn and Facebook), keyword_map is complete in metadata, all variations integrate keywords naturally without stuffing.
phase_coverage: Phase 3: Generate Email & Landing Page Variations
Phase 4: Generate App Store & Video Variations

test_cases.name: edge_case_unicode_and_special_characters
test_cases.scenario: Generate variations for a product with Unicode characters and special symbols in the description.

input.product_description: Café Connect™ is a point-of-sale system for coffee shops & restaurants. Features: real-time inventory, customer loyalty (rewards ★★★★★), and multi-location sync.
input.brand_voice_guidelines: Tone: warm and inviting. Vocabulary: accessible. Values: community, quality, convenience.

test_cases.expected_behavior: Unicode characters (é, ™, ★) are preserved in product name and variations, special characters do not break parsing or generation, all variations are valid and readable.
phase_coverage: Phase 3: Generate Email & Landing Page Variations
Phase 4: Generate App Store & Video Variations

test_cases.name: error_handling_product_description_too_short
test_cases.scenario: Attempt to generate variations with a product description below 50 characters, triggering an Abort error.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill aborts execution with error message requesting more detailed description, provides template with required fields (product name, core benefit, target audience, unique selling point), no variations are generated.

test_cases.name: error_handling_contradictory_brand_voice
test_cases.scenario: Provide contradictory brand voice guidelines (casual AND enterprise-formal) to test error handling and default fallback.

input.product_description: BrightPath is an AI-powered learning management system for enterprise training departments, enabling personalized learning paths and real-time progress tracking.
input.brand_voice_guidelines: Tone: casual and witty AND enterprise-formal and serious. Vocabulary: accessible and technical. Values: fun and professionalism.

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill detects contradictory guidelines, applies default brand voice (professional yet approachable), documents assumption in metadata, generates all variations using default voice, quality report notes that custom guidelines were contradictory and default was used.
phase_coverage: Phase 3: Generate Email & Landing Page Variations
Phase 4: Generate App Store & Video Variations

test_cases.name: quality_gate_tone_consistency_boundary
test_cases.scenario: Generate variations and verify tone consistency score is at or above the 75-point boundary, ensuring all variations reflect brand voice.

input.product_description: MindfulWork is a workplace wellness platform combining meditation, fitness tracking, and mental health resources for distributed teams. Integrates with Slack and Microsoft Teams.
input.brand_voice_guidelines: Tone: calm and supportive. Vocabulary: accessible and warm. Values: wellbeing, community, mindfulness.
input.target_audience_override: HR managers and wellness coordinators at tech companies

test_cases.expected_behavior: Tone consistency score is ≥75, all 10 variations reflect calm and supportive tone, brand alignment score is ≥75, consistency_notes document that tone is consistent across platforms with intentional platform-specific adaptations.
phase_coverage: Phase 3: Generate Email & Landing Page Variations
Phase 4: Generate App Store & Video Variations

test_cases.name: quality_gate_platform_compliance_all_constraints
test_cases.scenario: Verify that all 10 platform variations meet their specific character and word count constraints without violations.

input.product_description: FinanceFlow is a personal finance app for millennials, offering automated budgeting, investment tracking, and financial goal planning with AI-powered insights and peer benchmarking.
input.brand_voice_guidelines: Tone: friendly and empowering. Vocabulary: accessible. Values: financial freedom, transparency, growth.

test_cases.expected_behavior: All platform_compliance_flags are empty (no violations), Twitter ≤280 chars, LinkedIn 300-1300 chars, Facebook 100-200 chars, Instagram 125-150 chars, SMS ≤160 chars, email subject ≤50 chars, landing page headline 8-12 words, subheadline 15-25 words, app store 80-160 words, YouTube 150-300 words.
phase_coverage: Phase 3: Generate Email & Landing Page Variations
Phase 4: Generate App Store & Video Variations
